basics.name: Róger Mesén Delgado
basics.label: Data Scientist | Smart Farming | GIS Specialist
basics.summary: Geographer and anthropologist with expertise in Geographic Information Systems (GIS), spatial analysis, and pre-Columbian societies of Central America.

work.name: Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc.
work.summary: Supervised the integration of smart farming technologies to enhance agricultural productivity.
highlights: Implemented GIS and data analytics to optimize crop management strategies.

work.name: Geotecnologías
work.summary: Conducted spatial data analysis and mapping for various projects.
highlights: Developed Python scripts to automate geoprocessing tasks.

work.name: Universidad de Costa Rica, Escuela de Antropología
work.summary: Assisted in anthropological research and fieldwork.
highlights: Contributed to publications on pre-Columbian routes in the Caribbean of Costa Rica.

courses: Specialization in Geographic Information Systems (GIS) and spatial analysis.
Focused on pre-Columbian societies in Costa Rica.

awards.title: ArcGIS Desktop Entry Certification
awards.summary: Recognized for proficiency in ArcGIS Desktop applications.

publications.name: De tierras altas a tierras bajas: propuesta y exploración de una ruta prehispánica y colonial en el Caribe de Costa Rica
publications.summary: Explored a proposed route connecting the Central Valley to the Caribbean coast during pre-Columbian and colonial times.

publications.name: Vías de comunicación fluvial en las llanuras del Caribe precolombino de Costa Rica, del 300 – 1550 d. C.
publications.summary: Investigated the use of riverine communication routes in the Caribbean plains of pre-Columbian Costa Rica.

interests.name: Geographic Information Systems (GIS)
keywords: Application of GIS in environmental and agricultural studies
Development of spatial analysis tools using Python

interests.name: Anthropology
keywords: Study of pre-Columbian societies in Central America
Exploration of ancient trade routes and cultural interactions

projects.name: Analysis of House Prices
projects.summary: Data analysis of house prices using linear, Lasso, and Ridge regression models.

projects.name: Linear Regression with Bus Data CR
projects.summary: Analyzed bus income data in Costa Rica in relation to COVID-19 cases.
